title: [FIRRTL][LowerXMR] Lower RefSubOp to memory XMR
body:
Lower the `RefSubOp` to generate cross-module-reference into a `MemOp`.
They are used to generate verbatim encoded sub indexed reference to the register corresponding to the memory.
The register does not exist in the IR yet, and will be generated by `HWMemSimImpl`.
This commit is part of https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/3990
